[Unmanned Ground Vehicles](https://www.exail.com/product-range/unmanned-ground-vehicles)

Drawing on 80 years of robotics expertise, Exail offers a wide range of Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGVs) to perform missions in restricted, confined, hazardous or hard-to-reach areas. Exail designs and manufactures state-of-the-art Unmanned Ground Vehicles to counter emerging threats in the sector of Defence & Security.

items.notes: Complete AUV (A9-M, A18-M, A6K), USV (DriX series, Inspector 125), and UGV (IGUANA, CAMELEON, COBRA) platforms

evidence.snippet: ### Software for mission planning and analysis

Integrated into the [UMIS](https://www.exail.com/product-range/umis-unmanned-mcm-mine-countermeasure-integrated-system) Toolbox as part of Exail’s comprehensive MCM system, it leverages [Umisoft](https://www.exail.com/product/umisoft-mine-countermeasure-software-system) software for real-time data processing and target detection and classification. This enables operators to rapidly analyze information and make critical decisions with unmatched efficiency and confidence.

items.notes: UMIS (Unmanned MCM Integrated System) and Umisoft software for MCM mission planning, real-time monitoring, and command/control

evidence.snippet: ### Exail announces first sale of DriX H-9 for civil offshore operations to a European client
### Datasheet A9-M

readiness.notes: Products available with published datasheets; commercial sales reported (first sale of DriX H-9 for civil offshore operations)

tagline: French OEM producing tactical unmanned airframes (A9-M, A18-M, A6K, DriX, Inspector 125, IGUANA, CAMELEON, COBRA) alongside sensors, navigation systems, and ground control. Primary market is naval mine countermeasures and defense; trusted by 70+ militaries. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; limited public US defense contract visibility.
